headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -101.4)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 56% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Optimism dominates today but in a deeply negative way, hitting its worst score in the entire 160-day range (-65.9) driven by 80 quotes that are overwhelmingly mild-to-moderate in intensity — people are expressing muted, low-energy pessimism rather than outright outrage.
• Frustrations remain elevated at 57.1 with a striking 121 out of 155 quotes at strong intensity, meaning people are venting forcefully even if frustration isn't today's dominant signal.
• Optimism took a sharp drop from yesterday's -40.0 to today's -65.9, a notable single-day deterioration that sets a new floor for the tracked period.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
